summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Seymour Law website homepage - all features working perfectly. Static React frontend with framer-motion animations, responsive design, and mocked contact form submission.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with full hero section and Bahamian ocean background
Navbar sticky/glassmorphic behavior works on scroll
Mobile menu toggle works perfectly on smaller screens
All navigation links scroll to correct sections smoothly
Practice Areas section displays 6 cards with icons and descriptions
About/Legacy section shows Bahamian colonial architecture image and 30+ years badge
Why Choose Us section has navy background with 4 stats and 3 reasons
Contact form validates required fields and shows success message on submission
Footer displays with navy background and 9 links
Fade-up animations trigger on scroll using framer-motion
Gold underline animation works on navigation links
Practice area cards have hover effects (translateY transform)
Button hover effects work on CTA and consultation buttons
Form focus states work with gold border highlights
Image zoom hover effects work in about section
Mobile responsive layout adapts properly across viewport sizes
Mobile navigation and contact form functionality complete
